specCodeDefects.defect: D4 prose specifies 'Omit<ColumnDef<TData, unknown>, meta> & { meta?: TomisColumnMeta }' but TomisColumnMeta is never defined anywhere in the spec. This is an internal spec inconsistency (TomisColumnMeta is an undefined reference).
specCodeDefects.fixApplied: Used intersection pattern 'ColumnDef<TData, unknown> & { dataMap?; selectOptions? }' per spec Section 3.3 code template + ADR-002 (C-30 truth table: code template + ADR authoritative over D4 prose).

deviations.fromSpec: D6 + Section 3.4: 'import * as gridLicense from @tomis/grid-license' + feature-detect pattern (gridLicense as { verifyGridLicense?: () => void }).verifyGridLicense?.()
deviations.toImpl: Inline stub: function verifyOrWarn(_packageName: string): void { /* stub */ }; verifyOrWarn('@tomis/grid-pro-datamap');
deviations.reason: D6 (spec import pattern) + D7 (no package.json changes) + C-12 (tsc 0 errors) are mutually incompatible in this environment. @tomis/grid-license is not in package.json deps (D7 defers to G-004), and pnpm workspace linking is not active (pnpm not installed), so tsc fails with TS2307. Inline stub is the empirically-working precedent: grid-pro-tracking/src/index.ts and grid-pro-range/src/DragFillHandle.tsx both use this pattern successfully.
deviations.resolution: G-004 package.json update will add @tomis/grid-license to peerDeps; at that point index.ts can be updated to actual import if desired. ADR-003 in MOD-GRID-12-decisions.md documents this decision.

feedback.goalsJsonImplementFiles: goals.json N/A path issue (C-28: TOMIS/packages/ prefix in goals.json vs topvel-grid-monorepo/packages/ actual path) — spec Section 7 was authoritative, correct paths applied.
feedback.specInternalInconsistency: D4 prose references undefined TomisColumnMeta type — resolved via C-30 truth table (code template + ADR-002 authoritative). specCodeDefects[] entry recorded.
feedback.D6DeviatioN: grid-license inline stub used instead of spec D6 import pattern — environment-forced deviation (TS2307 without package.json dep; D7 forbids adding dep in G-001). Matches sibling Pro package precedent. ADR-003 documents rationale.
feedback.R1Resolved: R-1 (open question in spec Section 12): @tomis/grid-license import NOT possible without package.json entry + pnpm install. Resolved with inline stub pattern. G-004 will complete the wiring.
feedback.R2Resolved: R-2: TomisColumnDef intersection confirmed valid — tsc 0 errors with ColumnDef<TData, unknown> & { dataMap?; selectOptions? } intersection.
feedback.R3Resolved: R-3: DataMap<unknown> covariance confirmed — DataMap<TItem> has getItems(): TItem[] (covariant). Assignment from DataMap<ConcreteType> to DataMap<unknown> is type-safe.
feedback.bundleSize: ESM 995 B — well within 20KB Pro limit. Section 11 estimated +3KB; actual is ~1KB (factory + inline stub is minimal).
feedback.selfVerification: Score: YES(16) + NO(0) + N/A(8) = 24 items (matches rubric total 24 ✓). denominator = 16. score = 16/16 × 100 = 100.0. threshold = 90 (medium). passed = true.
